title: Piquant Irish Rocket Salad
description: A citrusy, silky salad of rocket, smoked salmon, and kombu-infused vinaigrette, energizing and pescatarian-friendly.
instructions: Wash and dry the rocket leaves, placing them in a large bowl.
Add the diced smoked salmon and orange segments to the bowl.
In a small jar, whisk together lemon juice, orange juice, honey, Dijon mustard, olive oil, kombu cold extract, and a pinch of sea salt until emulsified.
Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and gently toss to coat all ingredients.
Scatter the capers and crushed toasted walnuts on top.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve the salad immediately on a chilled plate.
Optionally, drizzle a light drizzle of extra virgin olive oil before serving.
Enjoy the bright citrus notes and subtle umami of kombu.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
